update.releaseNotes:
v5.7.5 - Changelog
New --- - Add a `Skip Double-O (Circle) Skills` per-plan toggle that only buys the single-circle version of a skill and skips the more expensive double-circle upgrade in the auto-strategy. Double-circle skills you add to the plan yourself are still bought. - Add a `Disable Schedule Re-Plan Upon Race Loss` option in the `Smart Race Solver` page to prevent the solver from re-planning the schedule when a race is lost. Defaults to off.
Adjustments --- - The `Running Style`, `Track Distance`, and `Track Surface` skill preferences now restrict auto-purchased skills across all spending strategies instead of only some of them. - Rename the `Crane Game` setting to `Claw Machine`. - Improved the `Remote Log Viewer` by allowing the `Compact` button to collapse/re-collapse the logs and racing style for each race will now be shown in the Race History's popover tooltips.
Fixes --- - Fix the `Remote Log Viewer` `Log Files` and `Debug Images` tabs showing nothing after the recent storage redesign. - Fix a rare crash on startup caused by reading empty template-match and stat-priority settings. - Fix a visual bug where the race history tooltip in the `Remote Log Viewer` could extend beyond the screen edge.
